name: production-theorem
description: Orchestrate: one-command planning, context, plugin delegation, execution, validation, UI visual gates, Redis harness awareness, and learning.

rustyred-thg.description: RustyRed-THG hot graph: native graph queries (neighbors/query/explain/schema), algorithms (PPR/PageRank/components/communities), and search (fulltext/spatial/vector). Read-only. Requires Bearer auth via $RUSTYRED_THG_API_TOKEN in the MCP client config.
